name: Mixtral 8x7B
lineage_path: McCulloch-Pitts neuron -> Perceptron -> MLP -> RNN -> LSTM -> Seq2Seq -> Transformer -> Mixtral 8x7B
summary: Mixtral 8x7B brought sparse mixture-of-experts to the open-source frontier, using 8 expert groups with 2 active per token to achieve GPT-3.5-level performance at a fraction of the inference cost. Released by the Paris-based Mistral AI, it proved that MoE architectures could be open-sourced effectively and spurred widespread adoption of sparse expert routing in both open and closed models.
